1312: /* Normally, zstd matchfinders follow this flow:
1313:  *     1. Compute hash at ip
1314:  *     2. Load index from hashTable[hash]
1315:  *     3. Check if *ip == *(base + index)
1316:  * In dictionary compression, loading *(base + index) is often an L2 or even L3 miss.
1317:  *
1318:  * Short cache is an optimization which allows us to avoid step 3 most of the time
1319:  * when the data doesn't actually match. With short cache, the flow becomes:
1320:  *     1. Compute (hash, currentTag) at ip. currentTag is an 8-bit independent hash at ip.
1321:  *     2. Load (index, matchTag) from hashTable[hash]. See ZSTD_writeTaggedIndex to understand how this works.
1322:  *     3. Only if currentTag == matchTag, check *ip == *(base + index). Otherwise, continue.
1323:  *
1324:  * Currently, short cache is only implemented in CDict hashtables. Thus, its use is limited to
1325:  * dictMatchState matchfinders.
1326:  */

1318:  * Short cache is an optimization which allows us to avoid step 3 most of the time
1319:  * when the data doesn't actually match. With short cache, the flow becomes:
1320:  *     1. Compute (hash, currentTag) at ip. currentTag is an 8-bit independent hash at ip.
1321:  *     2. Load (index, matchTag) from hashTable[hash]. See ZSTD_writeTaggedIndex to understand how this works.
1322:  *     3. Only if currentTag == matchTag, check *ip == *(base + index). Otherwise, continue.
1323:  *
1324:  * Currently, short cache is only implemented in CDict hashtables. Thus, its use is limited to
1325:  * dictMatchState matchfinders.
1326:  */
1327: #define ZSTD_SHORT_CACHE_TAG_BITS 8
1328: #define ZSTD_SHORT_CACHE_TAG_MASK ((1u << ZSTD_SHORT_CACHE_TAG_BITS) - 1)
1329: 
1330: /* Helper function for ZSTD_fillHashTable and ZSTD_fillDoubleHashTable.
1331:  * Unpacks hashAndTag into (hash, tag), then packs (index, tag) into hashTable[hash]. */
1332: MEM_STATIC void ZSTD_writeTaggedIndex(U32* const hashTable, size_t hashAndTag, U32 index) {
1333:     size_t const hash = hashAndTag >> ZSTD_SHORT_CACHE_TAG_BITS;
1334:     U32 const tag = (U32)(hashAndTag & ZSTD_SHORT_CACHE_TAG_MASK);
1335:     assert(index >> (32 - ZSTD_SHORT_CACHE_TAG_BITS) == 0);
1336:     hashTable[hash] = (index << ZSTD_SHORT_CACHE_TAG_BITS) | tag;
1337: }
